html:
Papyrus, also known as Paper, is a Refined Item crafted with 4 Cut Reeds. A Science Machine is required to unlock the recipe. Papyrus can be used to make Honey Poultice for healing as well as a Birdcage, Night Armor, and Compass. Wickerbottom can use it to craft Books and starts out with two Papyrus. Papyrus can be used to fuel Campfires, though it has a low burn time.

Contents

  • 1 Downloadable Content
  • 2 Usage
  • 3 Trivia
  • 4 Gallery

Downloadable Content

In the Reign of Giants and Shipwrecked DLCs, Papyrus is one of the ingredients to craft a Floral Shirt. Webber can use Papyrus to craft Spider Eggs.

Trivia

  • In the old research system, the research cost of Papyrus was 30.
  • Despite being made out of four Cut Reeds, Papyrus has the same burn time as one.
  • Papyrus is a thin paper-like material made from the pith of Cyperus Papyrus, a species of reed native to Africa, also called the paper reed.

Gallery

  • Original HD icon from Bonus Materials from CD Don't Starve.
ResourcesCraftable Items

Papyrus can be used to fuel Campfires, though it has a low burn time.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Giấy Cói, còn được gọi là Giấy, là một Vật Phẩm Tinh Chế được chế tạo bằng 4 Cây Sậy Cắt. Cần có Máy Khoa học để mở khóa công thức. Giấy cói có thể được sử dụng để làm Thuốc đắp mật ong để chữa bệnh cũng như làm Lồng chim, Giáp đêm và La bàn. Wickerbottom có ​​thể sử dụng nó để chế tạo Sách và bắt đầu với hai Giấy cói. Giấy cói có thể được sử dụng để đốt lửa trại, mặc dù nó có thời gian cháy thấp.

'''Papyrus''', also known as '''Paper''', is a [[Refined]] [[Item]] crafted with 4 [[Cut Reeds]]. A [[Science Machine]] is required to unlock the recipe. Papyrus can be used to make [[Honey Poultice]] for healing as well as a [[Birdcage]], [[Night Armor]], and [[Compass]]. [[Wickerbottom]] can use it to craft [[Books]] and starts out with two Papyrus. Papyrus can be used to fuel [[Campfire]]s, though it has a low burn time.

== {{Pic32|Gift Icon}} Downloadable Content ==
In the ''[[Reign of Giants]]'' and ''[[Shipwrecked]]'' DLCs, Papyrus is one of the ingredients to craft a [[Floral Shirt]]. [[Webber]] can use Papyrus to craft [[Spider Eggs]].

== {{Pic32|Placeholder}} Trivia ==
* In the old research system, the [[Research points list|research cost]] of Papyrus was 30.
* Despite being made out of four [[Cut Reeds]], Papyrus has the same burn time as one.
* Papyrus is a thin paper-like material made from the pith of Cyperus Papyrus, a species of reed native to Africa, also called the paper reed.
